subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Thy letter hath reached Him Who is wronged. God willing, through divine favor and the grace of the All-Merciful, from time immemorial [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله نامه ات لدی المظلوم حاضر انشاء الله بعنایت الهی و فضل رحمانی لم یزل و
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
